name: Skull Seadramon

signature_move.name: Thunder Javelin
signature_move.description: Fires a stinging lightning strike from the blade on its calvaria.

description: An Undead Seadramon that swims on through the Net Ocean in search of Digimon prey, surviving on instinct alone despite lacking flesh. As a result of it being reduced to nothing but bones, it has decreased resistance, allowing it to pursue its prey to the ends of the earth with high-speed movements. Once it captures the enemy, it slowly chokes the life out of them with its " Dead Roll ", where it uses its long body to constrict them. Its Special Move is firing a stinging lightning strike from the blade on its calvaria ( Thunder Javelin ). The more it charges this technique, the more powerful it becomes.
